item.title: RPGMaker MV/MZ Save Editor [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: RPGMaker MV/MZ Save Editor [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
RPGMaker MV/MZ Save Editor
(Utilities)
This is a tool for editing RPGMaker save files. It currently supports save files written by RPG Maker MV (.rpgsave) & MZ (.rmmzsave), but support for other versions of RPGMaker is planned for the future.
It uses Node.js for the backend and Electron for the GUI, which means you can interact with it using npm.

Works without internet access.
[read more]
item.description:
RPGMaker MV/MZ Save Editor
(Utilities)
This is a tool for editing RPGMaker save files. It currently supports save files written by RPG Maker MV (.rpgsave) & MZ (.rmmzsave), but support for other versions of RPGMaker is planned for the future.
It uses Node.js for the backend and Electron for the GUI, which means you can interact with it using npm.

Works without internet access.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RPGMaker MV/MZ Save Editor
(Utilities)
This is a tool for editing RPGMaker save files. It currently supports save files written by RPG Maker MV (.rpgsave) & MZ (.rmmzsave), but support for other versions of RPGMaker is planned for the future.
It uses Node.js for the backend and Electron for the GUI, which means you can interact with it using npm.

Works without internet access.
[read more]

item.title: Migrate MSSQL Database to MySQL [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Migrate MSSQL Database to MySQL [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryutility
item.itunes:summary:
Migrate MSSQL Database to MySQL
(Utilities)
Database transmission application converts MSSQL data contents into new MySQL database and provide comprehensive database relocation solution. Software convert all data types, default value, trigger, attributes, null value, key constraints, like primary key, unique key etc. Graphical user interface oriented application makes data entry quick and convenient and also run the application without any user interaction or using command line parameter. Database migration program compatible with a lot of character sets (including Unicode utf-8) and provide efficiency to transfer Microsoft SQL data records into newly database. Utility provides comprehensive database conversion solution, highest performance scalability and reliability to meet the requirements of database and transmit selected rows, column, attributes, tables fields and key constraints into MySQL database. Software can convert single or groups of tables from database and uses an interactive and organized algorithm makes the conversion of fully loaded databases done in few seconds. Easy to use applications maintain data integrity and completely transfer Microsoft SQL databases to MySQL server. Utility support all major Microsoft SQL data types and converts complete database or selected table contents simply and competently and increased performance and cross platform capability. Software Features: * Convert database into new destination database, or merge existing destination database as replacing names of tables. * Support different Microsoft Windows operating system Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. * GUI based tool supports different version of Microsoft SQL server express and Microsoft SQL server. * Software migrate selected tables, rows, columns, data, default values, primary key, unique key, null value, and indexes along with all attributes. * Trial version with help option available does not require any technical knowledge to operate software.

[read more]
item.description:
Migrate MSSQL Database to MySQL
(Utilities)
Database transmission application converts MSSQL data contents into new MySQL database and provide comprehensive database relocation solution. Software convert all data types, default value, trigger, attributes, null value, key constraints, like primary key, unique key etc. Graphical user interface oriented application makes data entry quick and convenient and also run the application without any user interaction or using command line parameter. Database migration program compatible with a lot of character sets (including Unicode utf-8) and provide efficiency to transfer Microsoft SQL data records into newly database. Utility provides comprehensive database conversion solution, highest performance scalability and reliability to meet the requirements of database and transmit selected rows, column, attributes, tables fields and key constraints into MySQL database. Software can convert single or groups of tables from database and uses an interactive and organized algorithm makes the conversion of fully loaded databases done in few seconds. Easy to use applications maintain data integrity and completely transfer Microsoft SQL databases to MySQL server. Utility support all major Microsoft SQL data types and converts complete database or selected table contents simply and competently and increased performance and cross platform capability. Software Features: * Convert database into new destination database, or merge existing destination database as replacing names of tables. * Support different Microsoft Windows operating system Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. * GUI based tool supports different version of Microsoft SQL server express and Microsoft SQL server. * Software migrate selected tables, rows, columns, data, default values, primary key, unique key, null value, and indexes along with all attributes. * Trial version with help option available does not require any technical knowledge to operate software.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Migrate MSSQL Database to MySQL
(Utilities)
Database transmission application converts MSSQL data contents into new MySQL database and provide comprehensive database relocation solution. Software convert all data types, default value, trigger, attributes, null value, key constraints, like primary key, unique key etc. Graphical user interface oriented application makes data entry quick and convenient and also run the application without any user interaction or using command line parameter. Database migration program compatible with a lot of character sets (including Unicode utf-8) and provide efficiency to transfer Microsoft SQL data records into newly database. Utility provides comprehensive database conversion solution, highest performance scalability and reliability to meet the requirements of database and transmit selected rows, column, attributes, tables fields and key constraints into MySQL database. Software can convert single or groups of tables from database and uses an interactive and organized algorithm makes the conversion of fully loaded databases done in few seconds. Easy to use applications maintain data integrity and completely transfer Microsoft SQL databases to MySQL server. Utility support all major Microsoft SQL data types and converts complete database or selected table contents simply and competently and increased performance and cross platform capability. Software Features: * Convert database into new destination database, or merge existing destination database as replacing names of tables. * Support different Microsoft Windows operating system Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. * GUI based tool supports different version of Microsoft SQL server express and Microsoft SQL server. * Software migrate selected tables, rows, columns, data, default values, primary key, unique key, null value, and indexes along with all attributes. * Trial version with help option available does not require any technical knowledge to operate software.

[read more]

item.title: Digital Camera Photo Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Photo Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: filerecoverysof
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Photo Recovery Tool
(Utilities)
Flexible and safe to use Digital Camera Photo Recovery Tool easily recovers vanished images, video clips, pictures etc from digicam using advance and standard search mode without require any kinds of technical skill. Economical Digital camera retrieval application facilitates attractive GUI so that user can easily understand software features.
[read more]
item.description:

Flexible and safe to use Digital Camera Photo Recovery Tool easily recovers vanished images, video clips, pictures etc from digicam using advance and standard search mode without require any kinds of technical skill. Economical Digital camera retrieval application facilitates attractive GUI so that user can easily understand software features.

Digital Camera Photo Recovery Tool
(Utilities)
Flexible and safe to use Digital Camera Photo Recovery Tool easily recovers vanished images, video clips, pictures etc from digicam using advance and standard search mode without require any kinds of technical skill. Economical Digital camera retrieval application facilitates attractive GUI so that user can easily understand software features.

item.title: Restore Memory Card Deleted Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Restore Memory Card Deleted Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryutility
item.itunes:summary:
Restore Memory Card Deleted Files
(Utilities)
Memory card files data recovery tool recovers, restore deleted, damaged, corrupted, formatted pictures, music, video, folders of various file types including mpeg , AVI, GIF, PNG, WAV, MOV, RIFF, MIDI, TIF, TIFF, 3GP, JPG, and other application document file formats.Unerase, Unformat, Undelete data from various memory card storage media like extreme digital card xD card, compact flash memory, mobile cell phone communicator, pc handheld computer, usb memory card storage media, multimedia memory card mmc, secure digital card sD card, pen drive memory card, smart cards, micro drive etc through utilizing this read-only restoration utility.This utility is considered as the safest and nondestructive utility that can provide preview of recoverable files before recovery. The software ensures restoration of photographs images audioThe software is helpful in restoring data even if your device is corrupted, damaged due to virus threats, hardware malfunction, power surges or due to any other human error. Features:* Retrieve and recover data from mmc, compact flash memory, secure digital card, smart card, PDA, xD card, mobile communicator, handheld computer, pocket pc, pen drive memory cards etc * Facilitates information recovery, digital image recovery, photograph restoration, picture restoration, flash card recovery, digital photo restoration, image retrieval. * Recovers data files folders when drive not formatted message displayed by windows 11,10,8,7 and apple Mac OSX or other operating system e.g. Linux Novell. * Restore information of different file types like jpg, jpeg, bmp, midi, tif, gif, avi, wav and many more. * Supports various kinds of USB port memory card readers, memory stick cards, compact flash memory cards, secure digital card etc. * Easiest and Quickest restoration tool for digital files and folders. * Revive documents that deleted accidentally or logically corrupted ensuring your business continuity.

[read more]
item.description:
Restore Memory Card Deleted Files
(Utilities)
Memory card files data recovery tool recovers, restore deleted, damaged, corrupted, formatted pictures, music, video, folders of various file types including mpeg , AVI, GIF, PNG, WAV, MOV, RIFF, MIDI, TIF, TIFF, 3GP, JPG, and other application document file formats.Unerase, Unformat, Undelete data from various memory card storage media like extreme digital card xD card, compact flash memory, mobile cell phone communicator, pc handheld computer, usb memory card storage media, multimedia memory card mmc, secure digital card sD card, pen drive memory card, smart cards, micro drive etc through utilizing this read-only restoration utility.This utility is considered as the safest and nondestructive utility that can provide preview of recoverable files before recovery. [read more]

item.title: Files Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Files Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: filerecoverysof
item.itunes:summary:
Files Recovery
(Utilities)
Data software recovery application provides facility to retrieve data, documents and text lost because of virus attack. Files Recovery software ensures to regain audio, video files that are deleted at time of sharing with other users. Data regaining tool is very easy to handle and run on your system without need of any expertise knowledge or assistant. File restore service is capable to recover music, images folders lost due to corrupt software.
[read more]
item.description:
Files Recovery
(Utilities)

Files Recovery software ensures to regain audio, video files that are deleted at time of sharing with other users. Data regaining tool is very easy to handle and run on your system without need of any expertise knowledge or assistant. File restore service is capable to recover music, images folders lost due to corrupt software.

item.content:encoded:
Files Recovery
(Utilities)
Data software recovery application provides facility to retrieve data, documents and text lost because of virus attack. Files Recovery software ensures to regain audio, video files that are deleted at time of sharing with other users. Data regaining tool is very easy to handle and run on your system without need of any expertise knowledge or assistant. File restore service is capable to recover music, images folders lost due to corrupt software.
[read more]

item.title: Recover iPod Contacts Pictures Songs [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Recover iPod Contacts Pictures Songs [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryutility
item.itunes:summary:
Recover iPod Contacts Pictures Songs
(Utilities)
Accidentally iPod reset factory setting restoration software is read only, non destructive and provides user friendly graphical user interface. Recovers all types of iPods like iPod mini, iPod nano, iPod apple, iPod shuffle, Samsung, iPod first generation, Sony, iPod next generation, Toshiba. Restore formatted photos, pictures and images like GIF, RIFF, TIFF, JPEG, BMP, PNG and JPG. Utility provides recovery to corrupted AVI, MPEG, WAV, mp3, mp4, m4v, m4b, m4a video files. Support Windows operating systems like Windows longhorn, vista, XP media center 2005, XP, 2003, 2000, 98, NT, ME. Utility can rescue and repairs the different storage devices such as flash memory, compact flash, secure digital, extreme digital cards. Tool detects the undetected sectors due to logical corruption, virus attack, software hardware malfunctioning, improper handling, and system crash. Features: * Software restores the accidentally updated iTunes. * Software recovery tool is read only and non destructive. * Utility supports the long file name (LFN) files. * Support different versions of Windows operating system like Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8 * Software provides graphical user interface environment where user can easily navigate. * Recovers data, documents and informations even if system is reformatted. * Tool restores the reset memory factory setting of iPod. * Fetch the data of different storage media brands like Sony, Samsung, and Toshiba. * Detect the undetected sectors due to system crash, virus attack, hardware software malfunctioning, improper handling. * Software recovery is cheap, fast and easily handled. * iPod deleted data recovery software is more accurate and efficient.
[read more]

item.title: Virtual Machine Manager [Virtualization]
item.itunes:title: Virtual Machine Manager [Virtualization]
item.itunes:author: aurangzeb
item.itunes:summary:
Virtual Machine Manager
(Virtualization)
This appimage is built using junest.
Tested on Fedora Kinoite 40 / Fedora Atomic 40.

*** NOTE ***
You must use Hypervisor QEMU/KVM user-session. Since root doesn't work on appimage.

!!! Report if doesn't work on your distro.
[read more]
item.description:
Virtual Machine Manager
(Virtualization)
This appimage is built using junest.
Tested on Fedora Kinoite 40 / Fedora Atomic 40.

*** NOTE ***
You must use Hypervisor QEMU/KVM user-session. Since root doesn't work on appimage.

!!! Report if doesn't work on your distro.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Virtual Machine Manager
(Virtualization)
This appimage is built using junest.
Tested on Fedora Kinoite 40 / Fedora Atomic 40.

*** NOTE ***
You must use Hypervisor QEMU/KVM user-session. Since root doesn't work on appimage.

!!! Report if doesn't work on your distro.
[read more]

item.title: FIX AIM BOOST NO ROOT FAB [Virtualization]
item.itunes:title: FIX AIM BOOST NO ROOT FAB [Virtualization]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
FIX AIM BOOST NO ROOT FAB
(Virtualization)

[h3] [b] MORE NON ROOTED TWEAKS [/b] [/h3]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2056054/]1.GODSPEED MODE NO ROOT [/url]
[b] THIS APP HAS MORE THAN 30 OPTIONS TO BOOST ANDROID WITHOUT ROOT[/b]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2058739/]2.NRFO [/url]
[b] NO TOOT FULL OPTIMIZATION [/b]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2065508/]3.WISP NO ROOT ENHANCER [/url]
[b] IT WILL ALSO OPTIMIZE YOUR DEVICE [/b]

[h3] [b]SUPPORT[/b] [/h3]
[url=https://godtspeed.xyz]Click here to visit GoDTspeed[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Join Official Channel[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Official Group to Share Your Problem[/url]


[h3][b] FIND MORE PROJECT FROM ☞ [/h3] [/b] [url=https://www.pling.com/u/revwhiteshadow] @revWhiteShadow [/url]

[h3][b]About.[/b][/h3]

GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, developed by revWhiteShadow, is a revolutionary module designed to enhance the aiming capabilities of players in online multiplayer games. The main feature of this module is its ability to fix aim assets, ensuring precise and accurate aiming in various gaming scenarios.

One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. However, with GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, these issues are effectively addressed. The module incorporates advanced algorithms and techniques to minimize gyrodelay, resulting in a significantly improved aiming experience.

By utilizing GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, players can expect a noticeable reduction in aim drift and smoother tracking of targets. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. With its innovative technology, this module aims to enhance the overall gaming experience, ensuring precise and accurate aim for players in online multiplayer environments.
[h2]Linux Installation[/h2]

Unzip the ZIP File:
unzip
Navigate to the Extracted Folder:

cd extracted_folder
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
./
For 64-bit systems:
./

[h2]Windows Installation[/h2]
Extract the zip:
Use a tool like WinRAR, 7-Zip, or the built-in Windows tool to extract the contents of the APK file.
Open Command Prompt:

Press Win + R, type cmd, and press Enter.
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
bash
For 64-bit systems:
bash

[h2]Android Installation / BlissOS / Other Emulator Installation[/h2]
Open Magisk / Kernel SU:

Ensure you have Magisk or Kernel SU installed on your device or emulator.
Go to the Module Section:

Open the Magisk app and navigate to the Modules section.
Select the Module from Storage:

Tap on "Select from Storage" and choose the previously downloaded file.
Install the Module:

After selecting the file, press "OK". The module will install itself.
Reboot the Device:

Once the installation is complete, reboot your device to finalize the installation.
[h2]Virtualisation Installation[/h2]
Step 1: Open LDPlayer,android studio or other simulation
Ensure LDPlayer, an Android emulator, is installed on your computer. Open LDPlayer to begin the process.

Step 2: Follow Android Installation
Within LDPlayer, follow the steps outlined in the Android Installation section:

Open Magisk or KernelSU within the emulator.
Navigate to the Modules section.
Select the module from storage.
Install the module.
Reboot the virtual device within LDPlayer.
[read more]

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. However, with GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, these issues are effectively addressed. The module incorporates advanced algorithms and techniques to minimize gyrodelay, resulting in a significantly improved aiming experience.

By utilizing GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, players can expect a noticeable reduction in aim drift and smoother tracking of targets. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. With its innovative technology, this module aims to enhance the overall gaming experience, ensuring precise and accurate aim for players in online multiplayer environments.
[h2]Linux Installation[/h2]

Unzip the ZIP File:
unzip
Navigate to the Extracted Folder:

cd extracted_folder
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
./
For 64-bit systems:
./

[h2]Windows Installation[/h2]
Extract the zip:
Use a tool like WinRAR, 7-Zip, or the built-in Windows tool to extract the contents of the APK file.
Open Command Prompt:

Press Win + R, type cmd, and press Enter.
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
bash
For 64-bit systems:
bash

[h2]Android Installation / BlissOS / Other Emulator Installation[/h2]
Open Magisk / Kernel SU:

Ensure you have Magisk or Kernel SU installed on your device or emulator.
Go to the Module Section:

Open the Magisk app and navigate to the Modules section.
Select the Module from Storage:

Tap on "Select from Storage" and choose the previously downloaded file.
Install the Module:

After selecting the file, press "OK". The module will install itself.
Reboot the Device:

Once the installation is complete, reboot your device to finalize the installation.
[h2]Virtualisation Installation[/h2]
Step 1: Open LDPlayer,android studio or other simulation
Ensure LDPlayer, an Android emulator, is installed on your computer. Open LDPlayer to begin the process.

Step 2: Follow Android Installation
Within LDPlayer, follow the steps outlined in the Android Installation section:

Open Magisk or KernelSU within the emulator.
Navigate to the Modules section.
Select the module from storage.
Install the module.
Reboot the virtual device within LDPlayer.
[read more]

item.title: htop [System Monitoring]
item.itunes:title: htop [System Monitoring]
item.itunes:author: aurangzeb
item.itunes:summary:
htop
(System Monitoring)
htop is an interactive system monitor process viewer and process manager. It is designed as an alternative to the Unix program top. It shows a frequently updated list of the processes running on a computer, normally ordered by the amount of CPU usage.

[read more]
item.description:
htop
(System Monitoring)
htop is an interactive system monitor process viewer and process manager. It is designed as an alternative to the Unix program top. It shows a frequently updated list of the processes running on a computer, normally ordered by the amount of CPU usage.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
htop
(System Monitoring)
htop is an interactive system monitor process viewer and process manager. It is designed as an alternative to the Unix program top. It shows a frequently updated list of the processes running on a computer, normally ordered by the amount of CPU usage.

[read more]
